hero.badge: The smarter way to manage tasks
hero.title: Organize your work.
hero.subtitle: Empower your team.
hero.description: TaskFlow is the workspace to track projects, manage tasks, and ship work together with role-based control and verified approvals.

features.title: Everything you need to
features.description: Built around the way modern teams actually deliver — clear ownership, focused workflows, and accountable outcomes.

fast.title: Lightning fast
fast.description: Built on Vite and React 19. Navigation, search, and updates feel instant.

secure.title: Secure & private
secure.description: JWT auth, hashed passwords, and role-based access on every project. Your data stays yours.

organized.title: Stay organized
organized.description: Group work into projects, filter by status and priority, and keep deadlines in one place.

team.title: Team collaboration
team.description: Invite teammates as owners, admins, or members. Everyone sees the work that's theirs.

documents.title: Centralized documents
documents.description: Upload PDFs, docs, and decks to a project so the team always works from the same source.

verify.title: Verified by the owner
verify.description: Tasks reach DONE only after the project owner approves. Quality stays high without slowing the team down.

analytics.title: Smart analytics
analytics.description: Visualize productivity trends and gain insights to optimize your work patterns.

time.title: Time tracking
time.description: Built-in time tracking to monitor how long tasks take and improve your estimates.

howItWorks.title: From idea to done in three steps
howItWorks.description: TaskFlow models the real workflow your team already follows.

create.title: Create a project
create.description: Set up a workspace, invite your team, and assign roles — owner, admin, or member.

assign.title: Assign the work
assign.description: Break work into tasks with priorities and deadlines, and route them to the right people.

verify.title: Review & verify
verify.description: Assignees submit for review. The owner approves to mark it done, or sends it back with feedback.

ctaSection.title: Ready to take control of your tasks?
ctaSection.description: Join the teams using TaskFlow to plan their projects, ship their work, and stay in sync.
